title: どぎまぎアフタヌーンティー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to drop by a cafe to quench my thirst.
The cafe is packed, but I finally make it to the
front of the line to enter...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Ding-a-ling! ♪ Welcome! ☆ Thank you for
waiting! Table for one?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! This place is super cute and fancy! I'm
gonna stick out like a sore thumb!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Really? You appear to be fitting in perfectly well
to me.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry, but we don't have any empty
tables at the moment...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would you mind sharing your table with
these two patrons?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're a trainer from the academy! Are you
sure? We'd really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well then, allow us to accept your kindness and
join you.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! ☆ I'll show you to your
table! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We sit at our table and look through the menu. As
we're about to order...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Um... For my drink, I'll have a, uh... Royal... Mari...
Maririn? Please.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! ♪ One Royal ☆ Maririn! Would you like
an Angel Ring to go with that? It's on our
seasonal dessert menu!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, uh, yeah... One of those too.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! ♪ Oh! You have a choice of three
sizes for your drink—Dolly, Pretty, or Charming!
Which would you like? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: P-pretty? Charming? Um, uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pardon us... This is our first time here. Might I
trouble you to explain the sizes?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! ☆ "Dolly" is a small, "Pretty" is a
medium, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After listening to the staff go through the unique
size names, we somehow manage to order three
drinks and a dessert.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Half of what she said was gibberish to
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phewww. I can finally relax. I was on edge that
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Your composure really saved my glutes, Ardan.
Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I should be the one thanking you for the
invitation. You've given me the opportunity to
experience this whimsical cafe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we've been meeting regularly at Mejiro
family gatherings ever since we were young. Ryan
has always been so kindhearted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
She would always teach me new games or show
me secret spots. I have many fun and fond
memories with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I almost forgot about that! You're older
than me, so I loved how you'd always listen to
what I had to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I still really appreciate that about you,
even now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, but of course. I'll gladly lend you an ear
whenever you may need it.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Ding-a-ling! ♪ Thank you for waiting! Here are
your Royal ☆ Maririns aaand your Angel Ring!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So this is a Royal Maririn... It's black tea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And this Angel Ring... appears to be a very large
Baumkuchen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's as big as a whole cake! Looks like a lot to
eat...
choice_data_list: You two can finish it if you share it!
You two can finish it if you share it!
How about getting it to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's as big as a whole cake! Looks like a lot to
eat...
choice_data_list: You two can finish it if you share it!
You two can finish it if you share it!
How about getting it to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Let's cut it and have half each, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan makes a silent, elegant cut through
the Baumkuchen. Unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh dear, I seem to have split it unevenly. You
can have the large portion, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, you cut it for me, so you should eat the
bigger piece!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you needn't be shy. Besides, I'd like to be
the mature and responsible Umamusume today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know. Perhaps I should cut it into smaller
pieces to make it easier to eat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um, thanks! Ack, I dunno why, but my face is
burning up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They happily split the Baumkuchen and finish the
whole thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's try some of this tea! It looks really
tasty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... The fragrance is so pure. These must be
single-estate tea leaves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You can tell that from the smell? You and Dober
know so much when it comes to tea... Talk about
well-educated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Our knowledge comes from our love of it. You
have much more knowledge than I do when it
comes to muscles, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's true... Oh! I know this one muscle workout
you can do right now, while you're sitting down!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's called a "seated calf raise." You focus on
putting weight on your soleus muscle and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My goodness... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy a spirited chat about various topics as
we sip and savor our tea.
